findings.description: The Methods/Statistical Analysis section contains no citations; every named method, score, guideline, and diagnostic criterion needs a canonical source (found uncited: STROBE).
findings.suggested_fix: Run /search-lit (paper mode) for canonical methodology sources, sync via /lit-sync, then rerun /verify-refs --strict.

findings.description: Cited references (0) are below the original_research target (25-45).
